历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 6872→8775→8320→27874→18086. From 2021 to 2023 (old Gaokao Science), the ranking fluctuated narrowly between 6872 and 8775. In 2024, the first year of Gansu's new Gaokao (3+1+2 model), the Physics Category included ethnic language classes and equivalent training programs, causing the minimum ranking to drop sharply to about 27874. In 2025, it rebounded to about 18086, reflecting the impact of new Gaokao subject classification and special type enrollment on the minimum ranking. The 2025 baseline is about 18086. Provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment: 18 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 41 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 45 students, an increase of about 9.8% compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class. The main ranking of Soft Science has risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and attractiveness. No negative public opinion about Minzu University of China appears in reputation documents, with stable reputation in recent years. Douyin heat total ranking is 80th (rated 'average'), indicating moderate to low attention on short video platforms, with no obvious abnormal signals in application heat. No record of enrollment gaps in the submission anomaly documents. Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature is A-, Sociology is A-, totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above. Ethnology is the university's flagship, directly corresponding to majors like Ethnology and Sociology in enrollment. Chinese Language and Literature A- corresponds to the Chinese Language and Literature major.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering have sustained high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended from 2024 to 2026). The university's Physics Category enrollment includes popular engineering majors like Computer, Electronic Information, and Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, strongly attracting candidates. Law is moderately popular, and the university also enrolls Law in the Physics Category. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Gansu Province is about 218,700, with an estimated 145,654 in the Physics Category, an increase of about 20% compared to 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition. Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu is relatively stable (around 40 students), expanding to 45 in 2026, but still a small increase relative to the total candidate growth.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 18,086, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.8% (pushing ranking numbers higher), the 2026 Physics Category candidate increase of about 20% (pushing ranking numbers higher), the continuous rise in university rankings enhancing attractiveness (pushing ranking numbers higher), and the appeal of popular engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 19,225, with a range of 18,725–19,725.

- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.

Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Chemistry)
- Biological Sciences Category (Biological Sciences, Ecology)
- Business Administration Category (Business Administration, Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18,725–19,725, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 18,725), you can focus on sprinting for popular engineering majors like Computer and Electronic Information. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 19,225), it is recommended to focus on moderate-difficulty majors such as Law, Statistics, and Economics. If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 19,725), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and attractiveness; no negative public opinion about Minzu University of China appears in reputation files, with stable reputation in recent years; Douyin heat total ranking is 80th (rated 'average'), indicating below-average attention on short video platforms with no obvious abnormal application heat signals; no record of enrollment gaps appears in the enrollment anomaly files; Ethnology A+ (top nationally), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above. Ethnology is the university's flagship, directly corresponding to the Ethnology major in enrollment; Chinese Language and Literature A- corresponds to the Chinese Language and Literature major; Sociology A- corresponds to the Sociology major.

专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular, and the university's history category enrollment includes Law; Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is socially recommended, and the university's Chinese Language and Literature is a corresponding major for its advantageous discipline; Journalism and Communication is socially discouraged, yet the university's history category also enrolls Journalism and Communication. 预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 7177, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 6.25% (direction of decreasing ranking number), a 2026 history category examinee increase of about 25% (direction of increasing ranking number), the continuous rise in university rankings enhancing attractiveness (direction of increasing ranking number), and the appeal of popular liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025.
